channel.desc: TV Punjab provides authentic and credible news and high-quality entertainment content featuring Punjabi language. Television Punjab content is designed to reflex the various cultural elements of Punjab.
Saga Music is a 24/7 channel dedicated to serving Punjabi music content globally, showcasing a diverse array of genres including Folk, Pop, Sufi, Hip Hop, and Rap.

We've got a time machine, the one which takes you into the world full of enchanting tales from the land of miracles, India. Would you like to time travel to the 50s, 60s, 70s, 80s and more to watch Bollywood legends create history with their exceptional performances, phenomenal dialogues and iconic song and dance? With a snap of a finger, with a button on a remote, Bollywood Classic will teleport you into the high definition world loaded with Bollywood classic movies, evergreen melodies, real life stories of the world famous icons and much more than you can imagine. This exclusive one of its kind channel, is home to legends like Raj Kapoor, Dev Anand, Rajesh Khanna, Amitabh Bachchan, Madhubala, Nargis, Zeenat Aman, Madhuri Dixit and more. the entire Bollywood classic collection, which grows every single month, and that too in your preferred language. Don't waste a single minute, or you'll miss this blast from the past, which is waiting to take you back.

A magical world awaits you, a single destination where lives glamour, fantasies and dreams. A world so colourful and real where you can literally touch, feel and become a part of the stories you see, a world of high definition. This perfect place of entertainment is called, Bollywood HD, a channel which offers treats from the world’s biggest producer of movies, Bollywood, all at your fingertips, exclusively for you. Tune in to experience larger than life blockbusters stories every single day, all year around. This one stop starry shop not just offers hot and sizzling premieres every month, but also gives you an upclose & personal peak into the gossip and news on the lives of the glamour Bollywood celebrities. Leave your worries behind and escape into the starlit world of Bollywood HD today.

Willow Sports is the free home for cricket in North America. The best of live and on-demand action from around the world is available, from ICC World Cups to the IPL. Also, other action packed live sports that will have you on the edge of your seat.

FAST moving 24/7 Sports News Network, daily breaking news about global sports, with interviews, features and highlights of the biggest sports events from over 200 sports federations. Covers sports from US and all around the world, EPL, NBA, NFL, MLB, F1, golf, tennis, cricket, etc.
A free, 24/7 English language LIVE sports, news, analysis and highlights network that brings everyone closer to the game.
SportsTVplus - All sports all the time 24-7 auto racing, BMX, basketball, beach volleyball, combat sports, football, golf, soccer, and many more. Find your game, highlights & news right here!

TNA Wrestling puts the spotlight on 20+ years of professional wrestling action, featuring addictive storylines, awe-inspiring athleticism and larger-than-life personalities. Relive all-time classics, modern masterpieces, plus original series.

FTF Sports is an emerging worldwide network offering engaging video content established to serve the passionate fan's appreciation for competition, sportsmanship, and performance. FTF Sports features a 24/7 broadcast, including live games & events, interviews, predictions, analysis, and a variety of dynamic, original programming.

Chardikla Time TV North America brings you 24/7 Punjabi news, entertainment, and cultural programming, serving the vibrant Punjabi and South Asian communities across North America. Experience exclusive coverage of major community events, including Bangla Sahib, Patna Sahib, Yuba City Nagar Kirtan, Los Angeles Nagar Kirtan, Holla Mohalla Riverside, Boston Bhangra, Sikh Day Parade New York, South Asian Showdown, Kabaddi, Soccer, and Field Hockey. Chardikla Time TV North America is your go-to destination for authentic Punjabi content. Watch live now and stay connected to your roots!

Chardikla Time TV is a top-ranking Free-to-Air Infotainment channel from Punjab, known for its live Gurbani telecast from sacred sites. It features news analysis, talk shows, crime series, documentaries, and social discussions. Catering to all age groups, it offers diverse content and strong engagement, making it a trusted choice for advertisers and viewers worldwide.

Chardikla Gurbaani TV, with the motto “A Bliss to Humanity,” is a 24×7 Free Sikh Devotional Channel available globally on various platforms. It features live telecasts from Takhat Sri Harimandir Ji Patna Sahib, Gurdwara Sri Bangla Sahib, and special broadcasts from North America. Dedicated to Sikh teachings, history, Katha, Kirtan, and Dhadhi shows, it spreads the message of Gurbani worldwide.

programme.title: Tum Haseen Main Jawaan
programme.desc: Sunil, a promiscuous navy officer, falls in love with Anuradha and introduces her to his family. However, an admirer of Anuradha tries to deceive Sunil by informing him that she is a single mother.

programme.title: Loha 1987
programme.desc: After a bid to arrest Sher Singh fails, officer Dayal is crippled and his partner Amar's career is sabotaged. When Amar gets another chance to nab Sher Singh, he hires two crooks for the job.

programme.title: Batwara
programme.desc: Amidst the fall of princely states in post-independence India, the friendship between Vikram, who comes from an aristocratic family, and a peasant is tested. Vikram turns vengeful after his brother is killed in a peasant colony.

programme.title: Bhala Manus
programme.desc: Shankar, a young man from a rural area, enters the world of smuggling after he travels to Mumbai in search of work. However, he soon realises his folly and tries to turn his life around.

programme.title: Nikaah
programme.desc: Young and attractive Niloufer is swept off her feet when foreign returned business magnate, Wasim Ahmed, proposes to her, and she accepts. After they divorce and he says she can’t marry him unless she will be divorced from another man.

programme.title: Choron Ki Baarat
programme.desc: Anju, a beautiful and spoilt woman, falls in love with a mysterious man, Shekhar. However, with time she realises that he has other motives.

programme.title: Be-Reham
programme.desc: Kumar Anand, an honest police officer, gets into trouble after he accidentally kills a gangster at his ex-lover Mala's house.

programme.title: Aasmaan
programme.desc: Captain Kumar's wealthy reserves fill Chandan, his lookalike, with jealousy. In order to fulfil his greed, he decides to takes Kumar's place by pretending to be him.

programme.title: Aaj Ka Daur 1985
programme.desc: A landlord offers an unemployed young man a position that requires him to evict people living in his building who do not pay rent on time.

programme.title: Bhrashtachar
programme.desc: A story of A journalist fighting corruption; A widow who becomes the mistress of local hoodlum Fatte Inspector Ashutosh, a political godfather who tries to win votes by promising the people a fair and an ideal government and Sattar.

programme.title: Aan Aur Shaan
programme.desc: Ram Singh abandons his wife and moves to the city with his son, Vijay, after being accused of theft.

programme.title: Aatish: Feel the Fire
programme.desc: A film about two brothers Baba, Avinish and the orphan Nawab who lives with him in Bombay. They meet lot of accidents in their life.

programme.title: Nishchaiy
programme.desc: 2 brothers, Ravi and Rohan separated due to unforeseen circumstances created by Ravi's employer. Years later Ravi, who is released from prison and Rohan, a successful lawyer clash with each other unaware of the fact that they are real brothers.

programme.title: Humse Na Jeeta Koi
programme.desc: Three brothers, Bheema, Kishan, and Vijay, navigate romance, mischief and duty as they diligently strive to fulfil their parents' wishes.

programme.title: Mohabbat Ki Arzoo
programme.desc: A motor mechanic posing as a rich man falls in love with a girl from a wealthy family pretending to be poor. The lovers rebel against their family members and society to remain together.

programme.title: Tada
programme.desc: An honest man turns to crime to avenge his father's death and ends up being a don in Mumbai. He has to fight with enemies, former allies and a corrupt police officer.

programme.title: Ahsaas
programme.desc: After being rejected by their fathers, Raju and Anu elope and get settled in a village but when the parents learn about their whereabouts, they decide to bring them back.

programme.title: Bhrashtachar
programme.desc: A story of A journalist fighting corruption; A widow who becomes the mistress of local hoodlum Fatte Inspector Ashutosh, a political godfather who tries to win votes by promising the people a fair and an ideal government and Sattar.

programme.title: Aan Aur Shaan
programme.desc: Ram Singh abandons his wife and moves to the city with his son, Vijay, after being accused of theft.

programme.title: Aatish: Feel the Fire
programme.desc: A film about two brothers Baba, Avinish and the orphan Nawab who lives with him in Bombay. They meet lot of accidents in their life.

programme.title: Mera Pati Sirf Mera Hai
programme.desc: Roopa does not get along with Prakash, her husband, and suspects he is having an affair. Things take a turn when she starts spreading vile rumours about Sharda, a woman living next door.

programme.title: Dil Ne Pukara
programme.desc: The life of a couple gets completely changes when they inquire the whereabouts of the girl's lover who is found after been missing for three years.

programme.title: Aaj Ki Awaaz
programme.desc: A mild-mannered citizen turns into a vigilante to counter police apathy but pays a price for it when the mafia kills his family. Devastated, he takes on the criminals in a fight to the finish.

programme.title: Haseena Maan Jayegi 1968
programme.desc: Rakesh and Kamal, doppelgangers of one another, fall for the same woman, Archana. However, when their petty rivalry evolves into something more sinister, she must find her true love.

programme.desc: Kumar Anand, an honest police officer, gets into trouble after he accidentally kills a gangster at his ex-lover Mala's house.

programme.title: Aasmaan
programme.desc: Captain Kumar's wealthy reserves fill Chandan, his lookalike, with jealousy. In order to fulfil his greed, he decides to takes Kumar's place by pretending to be him.

programme.title: Aaj Ka Daur 1985
programme.desc: A landlord offers an unemployed young man a position that requires him to evict people living in his building who do not pay rent on time.

programme.title: Bhrashtachar
programme.desc: A story of A journalist fighting corruption; A widow who becomes the mistress of local hoodlum Fatte Inspector Ashutosh, a political godfather who tries to win votes by promising the people a fair and an ideal government and Sattar.

programme.title: Aan Aur Shaan
programme.desc: Ram Singh abandons his wife and moves to the city with his son, Vijay, after being accused of theft.

programme.title: Aatish: Feel the Fire
programme.desc: A film about two brothers Baba, Avinish and the orphan Nawab who lives with him in Bombay. They meet lot of accidents in their life.

programme.title: Nishchaiy
programme.desc: 2 brothers, Ravi and Rohan separated due to unforeseen circumstances created by Ravi's employer. Years later Ravi, who is released from prison and Rohan, a successful lawyer clash with each other unaware of the fact that they are real brothers.

programme.title: Humse Na Jeeta Koi
programme.desc: Three brothers, Bheema, Kishan, and Vijay, navigate romance, mischief and duty as they diligently strive to fulfil their parents' wishes.

programme.title: Mohabbat Ki Arzoo
programme.desc: A motor mechanic posing as a rich man falls in love with a girl from a wealthy family pretending to be poor. The lovers rebel against their family members and society to remain together.

programme.title: Tada
programme.desc: An honest man turns to crime to avenge his father's death and ends up being a don in Mumbai. He has to fight with enemies, former allies and a corrupt police officer.

programme.title: Ahsaas
programme.desc: After being rejected by their fathers, Raju and Anu elope and get settled in a village but when the parents learn about their whereabouts, they decide to bring them back.

programme.title: Bhrashtachar
programme.desc: A story of A journalist fighting corruption; A widow who becomes the mistress of local hoodlum Fatte Inspector Ashutosh, a political godfather who tries to win votes by promising the people a fair and an ideal government and Sattar.

programme.title: Aan Aur Shaan
programme.desc: Ram Singh abandons his wife and moves to the city with his son, Vijay, after being accused of theft.

programme.title: Aatish: Feel the Fire
programme.desc: A film about two brothers Baba, Avinish and the orphan Nawab who lives with him in Bombay. They meet lot of accidents in their life.

programme.title: Mera Pati Sirf Mera Hai
programme.desc: Roopa does not get along with Prakash, her husband, and suspects he is having an affair. Things take a turn when she starts spreading vile rumours about Sharda, a woman living next door.

programme.title: Dil Ne Pukara
programme.desc: The life of a couple gets completely changes when they inquire the whereabouts of the girl's lover who is found after been missing for three years.

programme.title: Aaj Ki Awaaz
programme.desc: A mild-mannered citizen turns into a vigilante to counter police apathy but pays a price for it when the mafia kills his family. Devastated, he takes on the criminals in a fight to the finish.

programme.title: Haseena Maan Jayegi 1968
programme.desc: Rakesh and Kamal, doppelgangers of one another, fall for the same woman, Archana. However, when their petty rivalry evolves into something more sinister, she must find her true love.

programme.title: Once Upon A Time In Mumbai Dobaara
programme.desc: The story of Shoaib, an underworld don who came to power by killing his mentor and has extended his kingdom with the help of his best friend, Javed, and his former lover, Mumtaz.

programme.title: Main Tera Hero
programme.desc: A notorious boy decides to attend college in Bangalore, but instead falls in love with a girl who has to marry a terrorizing police officer.

programme.title: Lootera
programme.desc: Lootera set in the year is 1953, is a love story of Pakhi (Sonakshi Sinha) and Varun (Ranveer Singh). She lives with her father, a Zamindar, in an aristocratic world. She falls in love with a visiting archaeologist, but he holds a secret...

programme.title: Kyaa Super Kool Hain Hum
programme.desc: Adi and Sid want to make big but always run out of luck and series of confusion start taking place when they reach Goa.

programme.title: Nishchaiy
programme.desc: 2 brothers, Ravi and Rohan separated due to unforeseen circumstances created by Ravi's employer. Years later Ravi, who is released from prison and Rohan, a successful lawyer clash with each other unaware of the fact that they are real brothers.

programme.title: Dushman Duniya Ka
programme.desc: Mahesh, an honest man, is shocked to learn that his son, Lucky, has been using recreational drugs. Lucky promises to kick the habit but circumstances push him towards the world of drugs once again.

programme.title: Teri Payal Mere Geet
programme.desc: Premi makes a living by selling poems to Benni and falls in love with a courtesan, Laila Jaan. However, he leaves her after finding the truth about her but tries to get back with her.

programme.title: Madhoshi
programme.desc: Despite being engaged to Arpit, Anupama falls in love with Aman, a stranger. However, when her family members decide to meet him, they are shocked to discover that a person named Aman does not exist.

programme.title: Mangal Pandey: The Rising
programme.desc: Mangal Pandey and William Gordon become friends during a war in Afghanistan. But when the East India Company introduces a rifle that uses objectionable cartridges, Mangal Pandey rises in revolt.

programme.title: Hum To Mohabbat Karega
programme.desc: A waiter, is in love with the famous TV reporter Greeta Kapoor. After a man is murdered, Kapoor shows up at Raju's door to ask him some questions - it turns out that Raju served the dead man his last supper.

programme.title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
programme.desc: Raj and Priya, a married couple, hire Madhubala, a prostitute, as the surrogate mother of their child. Trouble brews when Madhubala falls in love with Raj and insists on keeping the child.

programme.title: Sarkar
programme.desc: The Indian version of The Godfather, with the focus on SARKAR, an Indian politician.

programme.title: Kitne Door... Kitne Paas
programme.desc: Jatin and Karishma, who meet each other on a plane to India, are set to marry the partners chosen by their respective parents. However, they find themselves attracted to each other.

programme.title: Raju Chacha
programme.desc: Raju is hired to pose as uncle to three orphaned kids in order to usurp their inheritance. But he changes his mind after falling in love with their governess and decides to fight the greedy relatives.

programme.title: Dil Hai Betaab
programme.desc: Meena and Raja, who are in love with each other, decide to marry.

programme.title: Kucch To Hai
programme.desc: A group of friends accidentally throw professor Bakshi off a cliff after seeing a corpse in his house. Years later, during a reunion, they are stalked by a mysterious killer.

programme.title: C Kkompany
programme.desc: Three friend residents in the 'C' block of a Mumbai Apartment complex with monetary issues decide to create a fake organization 'C Company' in order to extort 1 Crore Rupees but thimgs goes wrong.

programme.desc: The Indian version of The Godfather, with the focus on SARKAR, an Indian politician.
